info.title: BlueClerk
info.description: APIs version 2 for both app and website

tags.name: Service Ticket
tags.description: For creating and getting service tickets

post.summary: To get all jobs of a company or company of employee.

parameters.name: workType
parameters.description: Array of work types to filter jobs

parameters.name: companyLocation
parameters.description: Array of company locations to filter jobs

keyword.description: Filter jobs by search keyword to Job Id, Customer's name, Subdivision's name address, Job Address's name address, Technician's name, and Contractor's name

status.description: Filter jobs by status (PENDING => 0, STARTED => 1, FINISHED => 2, CANCELED => 3, RESCHEDULED => 4, PAUSED => 5, INCOMPLETE => 6)

startDate.description: Filter of start jobs schedule date

endDate.description: Filter of end jobs schedule date

technicianIds.description: List of technician id's in array. eg. ["608b9f54c30223196b7ab22a", "608b9f54c30223196b7ab21b"]

currentPage.description: Page to go on the pagination. Default value 0

pageSize.description: The numbers of jobs to return per page e.g. 10. When not provided, will return 30 jobs by default

companyId.description: Id of company if contractor is hitting for other company

parameters.name: workType
parameters.description: Array of work types to filter invoices

parameters.name: companyLocation
parameters.description: Array of company locations to filter invoices

pageSize.description: The numbers of jobs to return per page e.g. 10. When not provided, will return 30 jobs by default

currentPage.description: Page to go on the pagination. Default value 0

keyword.description: Filter invoices by search keyword to Job Id, Customer's name, Job's Subdivision name address, Job's Job Address name address, Job's Technician name, and Job's Contractor name

startDate.description: Filter invoices by start of the issued date

endDate.description: Filter invoices by end of the issued date

missingPO.description: Filter invoices by missing P.O. Number. Only show invoices that don't have any PO number

status.description: Filter invoices by multiple status. Format example: ["UNPAID", "PARTIALLY_PAID", "PAID"]

customerContactId.description: Filter invoices by Customer Contact ID

jobLocationId.description: Filter invoices by Subdivision/Job Location ID

jobAddress.description: Filter invoices by Job Address' address

jobCity.description: Filter invoices by Job Address' city

jobState.description: Filter invoices by Job Address' state

jobZip.description: Filter invoices by Job Address' Zip

startAmount.description: Filter invoices by Start Amount range

endAmount.description: Filter invoices by End Amount range

lastEmailStartDate.description: Filter invoices by Last Email Send start range

lastEmailEndDate.description: Filter invoices by Last Email Send end range

dueDate.description: Filter invoices by dueDate or before

recentOnly.description: To force API to return only last 90 days even with any filter applied. Be default, when any filter applied, API will return all data so user could search through all invoices

parameters.name: keyword
parameters.description: Filter job reports by search keyword to Job Id, Customer's name, Subdivision's name address, Job Address's name address, Technician's name, and Contractor's name

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Filter of start job reports' job date

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter of end job reports' job date

parameters.name: currentPage
parameters.description: Page to go on the pagination. Default value 0

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The numbers of jobs to return per page e.g. 10. When not provided, will return 30 jobs by default

post.summary: To get all service tickets of a company or company of employee.

parameters.name: workType
parameters.description: Array of work types to filter invoices

parameters.name: companyLocation
parameters.description: Array of company locations to filter invoices

keyword.description: Filter service tickets by search keyword to Service Ticket Id, Customer's name, Subdivision's name address, Technician's name, and Contractor's name

status.description: Filter service tickets by status (OPEN => 0, AVAILABLE => 1, ALL => 2)

startDate.description: Filter of start service tickets schedule date

endDate.description: Filter of end service tickets schedule date

technicianIds.description: List of technician id's in array. eg. ["608b9f54c30223196b7ab22a", "608b9f54c30223196b7ab21b"]

currentPage.description: Page to go on the pagination. Default value 0

pageSize.description: The numbers of service tickets to return per page e.g. 10. When not provided, will return 30 service tickets by default

companyId.description: Id of company if contractor is hitting for other company

get.summary: Retrieve user permissions by the given ID

post.summary: Update/Insert user permissions by the given ID
To get all service tickets of a company or company of employee.

parameters.name: workType
parameters.description: Array of work types to filter invoices

parameters.name: companyLocation
parameters.description: Array of company locations to filter invoices

keyword.description: Filter service tickets by search keyword to Service Ticket Id, Customer's name, Subdivision's name address, Technician's name, and Contractor's name

status.description: Filter service tickets by status (OPEN => 0, AVAILABLE => 1, ALL => 2)

startDate.description: Filter of start service tickets schedule date

endDate.description: Filter of end service tickets schedule date

technicianIds.description: List of technician id's in array. eg. ["608b9f54c30223196b7ab22a", "608b9f54c30223196b7ab21b"]

currentPage.description: Page to go on the pagination. Default value 0

pageSize.description: The numbers of service tickets to return per page e.g. 10. When not provided, will return 30 service tickets by default

companyId.description: Id of company if contractor is hitting for other company

get.summary: Get the Service Ticket email template before send the email

post.summary: Send an email about the Service Ticket

recipients.description: List of all recipients in array. Example: ["zyzorafu@abyssmail.com","tiboqama@boximail.com"]

subject.description: Subject of the email, if not provided will use company's email default

message.description: Message of the email, if not provided will use company's email default

copyToMyself.description: To send copy to user himself

company.description: Id of company who created it

comment.description: Comment by employee who completed the job

startTime.description: Date and time when the job was started

endTime.description: Date and time when the job was finished

invoiceId.description: Custom invoice id to be shown on invoice

inoviceType.description: 0 for the invoice for job and 1 for the invoice of purchase order

job.description: Id of job from which the invoice was created

purchaseOrder.description: Id of the purchase order if the invoic is for purchase order only

estimate.description: Id of the estimate if the invoic is for estimate only

customer.description: Id of cusomer from whom the invoice was created

company.description: Id of company to whom this invoice belongs

charges.description: Charges amount from job or if you have customized while creating invoice

tax.description: Tax amount to be added in charges to caculate the total invoice

total.description: Total amount to be charged to customer

taxPercentage.description: Tax percentage applied to invoice default will be 0

timeSpent.description: No of hourse spent on that job

createdBy.description: Id of employee of company who has created this invoice

createdAt.description: Date time when the invoice was created

jobId.description: Auto generated job id from sevice ticket number

status.description: Status of job if it is finshed or not

employeeType.description: If false that means assigned to employee if true that means job is assigned to vendor or vendors employee

note.description: Additional note added by person who created ticket

ticketId.description: Auto generated ticket number using prefix defined by user

role.description: Role of technician in his company/organization

email.description: Email address of customer or from info.email
Email address of customer if present

phone.description: Phone number of customer if present

email.description: Email address of person who created job

role.description: Role of person who created job in his company/organization

comment.description: comment added by person who scanned the equipment

invoiceId.description: Custom invoice id to be shown on invoice

invoiceType.description: 0 for the invoice for job and 1 for the invoice of purchase order

purchaseOrder.description: Id of the purchase order if the invoic is for purchase order only

estimate.description: Id of the estimate if the invoic is for estimate only

charges.description: Charges amount from job or if you have customized while creating invoice

taxPercentage.description: Tax percentage applied to invoice default will be 0

tax.description: Tax amount to be added in charges to caculate the total invoice

total.description: Total amount to be charged to customer

createdBy.description: Id of user who created ticket

company.description: Id of company who created it

industry.description: industry id for whome the job type was created

createdBy.description: Id of the company who created it, or null if the global admin created it.

message.description: Error message in case of operation failure
